projects.description: This is a tool that helps you quickly build backend services based on Asp.Net Core and EF Core. It provides command line, WebUI and IDE MCP support. projects.name: OpenRay
projects.description: OpenRay is one of the largest open-source systems for collecting, validating, and curating free proxy servers. It runs hourly through a three-stage pipeline to remove dead proxies and maintain high-quality lists by protocol and country. Originally built for Iran, it now serves users worldwide.
